title: DE7 8EF, SRCL Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/CB3200UL/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: SRCL Limited   Installation name: Ilkeston Healthcare Waste Transfer Station   Permit number: EPR/CB3200UL/V006   "
